consumption_rule: The authority is consumed when Task 44 persists any valid terminal outcome, whether or not canonical mutations were applied.
invalidation_rules: Task 41 main report identity no longer matches the authorized digest.
Task 42 main report identity no longer matches the authorized digest.
The canonical target state changes incompatibly with artifact 43d.
Task 44 cannot identify every exact authorized target.
Any executor other than Task 44 attempts to exercise the authority.
Task 44 cannot prove zero unrelated field changes.
Task 44 attempts to expand, omit, substitute, or infer a target or wording.
